name: No Cholesterol Challah
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Very warm pure spring water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in order.
2. Optional toppings include raisins, sesame seeds, or poppy seeds.
3. Place dough on a lightly greased baking pan or cookie sheet.
4. Let the dough rise at room temperature for 4 to 6 hours or longer if needed.
5. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
6. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes until golden brown.
7. For an extra shiny crust, brush with a mixture of 1-1/2 tsp Ener-g egg replacer and 1 tbsp pure spring water before baking.
